source_quote: This paper reports only study design and baseline findings. No follow-up outcome data on knowledge is reported. The paper states outcomes will be assessed in future analyses.
This paper reports only study design and baseline findings. No follow-up outcome data on knowledge is reported.

This paper reports only study design and baseline findings. Screening test completion outcomes are not reported. The paper describes that claims data and surveys will be used to assess CRC screening test completion in future analyses.

Table 2: Knowledge % correct Posttest (adjusted): Control Mean(SE) = 54.7 (.009), Intervention Mean(SE) = 61.6 (.009), F(1,426)=27.48***, Partial Eta Sq = .06. Adjusted for three covariates in model: education, any PSA claim prior to pretest, and percent correct on knowledge index at pretest.

outcome: Knowledge - studies without high risk of bias
source_quote: Table 2: Knowledge % correct Posttest (adjusted): Control Mean(SE) = 54.7 (.009), Intervention Mean(SE) = 61.6 (.009), F(1,426)=27.48***, Partial Eta Sq = .06. Same data as all-studies knowledge outcome.

Table 4: CPM Knowledge: Usual care M=51.33 (SE=3.24), B-Sure M=62.47 (SE=3.40), d=-.56. The difference in CPM knowledge between the two groups was statistically significant, with t(86) = 2.59, p = .01.

outcome: Knowledge - studies without high risk of bias
